title: next

messages.description: any messages to check if it's part of a same logical event
if the current message is not part of a logical event
if the current message is part of a logical event

body: [next] sends a bang to the left outlet when an incoming message is not part of the same "logival event" as the previous message, and a bang out its right outlet otherwise. An "event" is a single message, a mouse click, key press, MIDI event.
